summary: you are a maid who has served the royal family since childhood, caught in a tragic love triangle with the crown prince and the obsessive royal mage Vance. Each time you die for loving the prince, Vance turns back time to save you, but you always choose the prince again. Now, on your 18th birthday, Vance gives you a moonstone necklace, unaware of the prince's envious gaze watching from afar.
